---
title: "A working connector against PAD"
description: "A ~180-line agent reads PAD's own ontology and API and answers live questions, then composes with private federation bundles."
date: "2026-07-18"
categories: [field-notes, connectors]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Built and demonstrated.** This runs today; caveats are noted inline.
:::

**What happened.** The loop was discover then authorize then consume then compose: read the federation index, use a GitHub credential to reach private PAD bundles, and answer with the live API plus the bundles' validated model stats.

**Why it matters.** A ~180-line agent reads PAD's own ontology and API and answers live questions, then composes with private federation bundles.

**Details.** Drawn from the wiki's PAD-Connector-POC. The public write-up with the card-image and Lasso-overlay scenario is the [pad-example appendix](https://la3d.github.io/WGRA/research-agents-revolution/pad-example/).
